# comfyui_recraft_text_to_vector_node (Resource)

Generates SVG synchronously based on prompt and resolution. [api node/image/Recraft]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `n` (Number) Input: INT default: 1
- `prompt` (String) Input: STRING default:
- `seed` (Number) Input: INT default: 0
- `size` (String) Input: COMBO
- `substyle` (String) Input: COMBO

### Optional

- `negative_prompt` (String) Input: STRING default:
- `recraft_controls` (String) Input: RecraftIO.CONTROLS (link)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type
- `svg_output` (String) Output: SVG (slot 0)
